    MILITARY GOVERNMENT O F SANTO DOMINGO,
              Executive Order No. 668.
         AMENDNENT T O THE BUDGET LAW,
            EXECUTIVE ORDER NO. 560.
                  0. G. No. 3256.

     By virtue of the powers vested in the Military Government
of Santo Domingo, the following Executive Order is hereby pro-
mulgated :
     ARTICLE 1. The Budget for 1921, Executive Order No.
560, is hereby amended as f2!!ows :
      (a) Article 1200. Chapter XI1 of the said Budget, as mod-
ified by Executive Order No. 5 9 1 ; is further modified by reduc-
ing item No. 194 to $13,808.00. The total sum appropriated
under Chapter XI1 is denreased by $1,000.
     (b) Article 603 of Chapter VI, Department of .State of
Sanitation and Beneficence, t o read as follows:

    The total sum appropriated m d e r Chapter VI is increased
by $1,000.

Santo Domingo, D. R.
